questionHtml:
The micrograph shows a section through the root of a dicotyledonous plant (× 400).

Describe the distribution of vascular tissues in the stem of dicotyledonous plants.
markschemeHtml:
a. stem vascular tissue is in bundles ✔

b. «bundles» form a ring

c. phloem is towards outside «of bundle»
OR
xylem is towards centre «of bundle» ✔

 

Allow answers in an annotated drawing

meta.title: Describe the distribution of vascular tissues in the stem of dicotyledonous plants.
breadcrumbLabels: 9.1 Transport in the xylem of plants
9.2 Transport in the phloem of plants
